attacking_style: Launches late attacks inside final 1km at technical features (roundabouts), attempting surprise over pure power. Timing-based rather than gradient or distance attacks.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical pattern from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Technical finishes with roundabouts or features allowing surprise positioning moves. Exposed on gradients where pure power determines outcome.
vulnerability: Lacks sustained power to hold off elite sprinters like Sagan who can wait and counter. Gradient finishes expose power limitations despite good positioning.
key_patterns: Attacks at technical features (roundabouts) in final kilometer seeking positional advantage.
Strong positioning skills but insufficient power to hold off waiting elite sprinters.
Relies on surprise timing rather than sustained power in finale attacks.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows tactical awareness but power deficit against top-tier opposition
